claim_boundary: G005 bounded patch-token/gated-emission candidate for public FDM-1 recipe reproduction on D2E: raw screen-video patch tokens plus temporal masked action-token diffusion with train-fit action-occupancy gates to control false positives. Not G005 completion evidence.

inferred_or_novel_components: D2E compact luma video-token approximation
local temporal row window
weighted open-vocab action-token sequence loss
center-row emission for D2E paper-compatible metrics
bounded prefix row budget before full-corpus promotion
split-safe non-noop confidence-budgeted unmasking over temporal action-token candidates
focal sparse-token loss for key/button events
family-specific split-safe confidence-budget calibration for action-token families
sparse key/button event-presence auxiliary losses inside temporal action-token denoising
event-probability-biased candidate scoring during iterative unmasking
fit-train video/action-token retrieval prior for masked-diffusion candidate scoring
retrieval-prior blend during center-row action-token emission
PAD-aware sparse action-token slots so empty fixed-width slots are not trained as repeated NOOP labels
per-family candidate preservation and diagnostics so rare key/button action-token candidates are not truncated by frequent mouse-motion tokens before train-heldout budget calibration
observed-token-only train-fit candidate token prior correction that never boosts tokens unseen in fit rows
temporal mouse-button class auxiliary head that re-ranks press/release action-token candidates inside iterative unmasking
family-scoped sparse key/button token-presence auxiliaries that re-rank exact action-token candidates inside iterative unmasking without target-label calibration
raw downsampled D2E screen-video tokens replacing compact luma16 diagnostics
small open 3D-CNN video-token encoder with masked raw-frame reconstruction
full action-token presence auxiliary over the masked-diffusion representation to preserve mouse-move bin identity within the public FDM-1 token recipe
patch-token raw-video encoder that preserves multiple compressed screen-video tokens per temporal row instead of global-pooling each frame window
inference-aligned full action-mask corruption curriculum mixed with partial masked-diffusion corruption
button no-action occupancy gate from the temporal button-class head to suppress mouse-button false positives before train-heldout family-budget calibration
event-presence multiplicative candidate gate from the same masked-diffusion representation to reduce action emissions on no-action rows

idm_objective.corruption: mixed full-mask and partial mask/random corruption over temporal action-token slots to match the all-mask iterative IDM inference schedule while retaining masked-diffusion denoising
idm_objective.loss: focal weighted cross entropy over PAD-aware temporal masked action-token sequences with sparse family/full token-presence and action-occupancy auxiliary losses; auxiliaries gate iterative candidate ranking but do not replace masked-diffusion token prediction

inference_schedule.selection: iteratively unmask high-confidence temporal action-token slots, then apply train-fit action-occupancy/event gates, observed-token priors, held-out-train family budgets, and fit-train video/action retrieval priors without target-label calibration

video_encoder.approximation: Open D2E approximation: raw 96x96 grayscale screen-video frame stacks loaded from split-safe D2E video tensor caches and encoded as multiple patch/video tokens by a small 3D CNN with masked raw-frame reconstruction; not the closed-source SI tokenizer.
video_encoder.input: D2E 480p/original frame references decoded to raw 96x96 grayscale patch/video tokens over [0,1,2] frame offsets and a temporal row window
video_encoder.public_anchor: FDM-1 trains directly on compressed screen-video representations before inverse-dynamics labeling.

action_occupancy_candidate_gate.claim_boundary: Open D2E approximation inside the masked-diffusion IDM inference schedule; not a post-hoc target heuristic and not a closed-source FDM-1 internal claim.
action_occupancy_candidate_gate.d2e_approximation: Use no-button/event-presence probabilities learned from the same temporal masked-diffusion representation to multiplicatively gate key/button candidate scores before train-heldout calibration, reducing false-positive emissions without target-label tuning.
action_occupancy_candidate_gate.public_anchor: FDM-1 iteratively unmasks action tokens and must decide which masked positions correspond to real actions versus no action.

candidate_family_preservation.claim_boundary: Inference/candidate-generation approximation inside the public masked-diffusion action-token recipe; not target-label calibration and not closed-source FDM-1 parity.
candidate_family_preservation.d2e_approximation: Before held-out-train family-budget calibration, retain the top N keyboard, mouse-button, and mouse-move action-token candidates per row in addition to global top candidates. Target labels are used only for diagnostic coverage reports.
candidate_family_preservation.public_anchor: FDM-1 iteratively unmasks high-confidence action-token positions; preserving bounded candidates for each action family keeps rare key/button tokens available to that recipe-shaped confidence schedule.

candidate_token_prior_correction.claim_boundary: Train-fit candidate-scoring approximation inside the public masked-diffusion action-token recipe; not a post-hoc target heuristic and not closed-source FDM-1 parity.
candidate_token_prior_correction.d2e_approximation: Compute bounded inverse-frequency weights from fit/train D2E action-token counts for selected sparse action families and multiply center-token candidate scores before held-out-train budget calibration. Tokens absent from fit rows receive a fixed suppression/neutral weight instead of an inverse-frequency boost. Target/eval labels are never used.
candidate_token_prior_correction.public_anchor: FDM-1 iteratively unmasks high-confidence action-token positions; unpublished candidate scoring details must handle sparse key/button action-token priors without target-label calibration.

family_non_noop_budgeted_unmasking.claim_boundary: Split-safe calibration/inference approximation only; not a closed-source FDM-1 internal claim.
family_non_noop_budgeted_unmasking.d2e_approximation: Calibrate separate keyboard, mouse-button, and mouse-move confidence thresholds on held-out D2E training rows, then apply them to target rows without target-label access.
family_non_noop_budgeted_unmasking.public_anchor: FDM-1 iteratively unmasks high-confidence action-token positions; family budgets preserve that schedule while preventing frequent mouse-motion tokens from consuming all non-noop emissions.

family_token_presence_auxiliary.claim_boundary: Open D2E approximation inside the public masked-diffusion action-token recipe; not a post-hoc target heuristic and not closed-source FDM-1 parity.
family_token_presence_auxiliary.d2e_approximation: Train family-scoped multi-hot key and mouse-button token-presence heads from the same temporal masked action-token representation over fit D2E rows, then blend per-token probabilities into candidate scores before held-out-train family calibration. Target labels are never used for scoring.
family_token_presence_auxiliary.public_anchor: FDM-1 IDM predicts masked action-token values; unpublished scoring details must preserve sparse key/button token identity during iterative unmasking.

full_action_mask_curriculum.claim_boundary: Open training-schedule approximation inside masked-diffusion IDM; not a target-label heuristic and not a closed-source FDM-1 internal claim.
full_action_mask_curriculum.d2e_approximation: During training, mix fully masked action-token windows with ordinary partial corruption so the model sees the same all-mask start state used by 16-step inference.
full_action_mask_curriculum.public_anchor: FDM-1 IDM inference feeds frames interleaved with mask tokens and iteratively predicts masked action-token positions.

non_noop_budgeted_unmasking.claim_boundary: Split-safe calibration only; target labels are evaluation/diagnostic evidence and no FDM-1 parity is claimed.
non_noop_budgeted_unmasking.d2e_approximation: Calibrate a confidence threshold over held-out D2E training rows for non-noop temporal action-token candidates, then apply it to unlabeled target rows without target labels.
non_noop_budgeted_unmasking.public_anchor: FDM-1 spends baseline effort on high-probability actions first and iteratively unmasks high-confidence action tokens.

pad_aware_action_slots.claim_boundary: Open D2E implementation detail to prevent sparse-action loss collapse; not a closed-source FDM-1 parity claim.
pad_aware_action_slots.d2e_approximation: Preserve <FDM1_ACTION_PAD> in padded action slots and exclude those positions from denoising loss, while keeping a single NOOP token for truly empty bins.
pad_aware_action_slots.public_anchor: FDM-1 predicts action-token sequences; absent fixed-width positions should be padding/masked-token structure rather than repeated semantic no-op labels.

raw_video_patch_tokens.claim_boundary: Open D2E video-token approximation; not the closed-source FDM-1 tokenizer and not a parity claim.
raw_video_patch_tokens.d2e_approximation: Encode each D2E raw 96x96 frame stack into multiple learned patch/video tokens per temporal row before the noncausal masked action-token transformer, instead of collapsing the row into one global vector.
raw_video_patch_tokens.public_anchor: FDM-1 trains directly on compressed screen-video tokens and emphasizes high compression without losing semantic detail.

raw_video_tokens.claim_boundary: Open raw-video approximation on D2E; not the closed-source FDM-1 tokenizer and not a parity claim.
raw_video_tokens.d2e_approximation: Load decoded D2E frame references from split-safe video tensor caches as normalized raw grayscale 96x96 video tokens at offsets [0,1,2], then feed them to the same noncausal masked action-token diffusion IDM.
raw_video_tokens.public_anchor: FDM-1 trains on compressed screen-video representations rather than handcrafted action-history features.

retrieval_action_prior.claim_boundary: Open D2E approximation inside the recipe-shaped IDM, not a post-hoc metric heuristic and not closed-source FDM-1 parity.
retrieval_action_prior.d2e_approximation: Encode fit/train D2E video windows, retrieve nearest train rows by video embedding, and blend their action-token votes into candidate scores during iterative center-token emission. Target labels are never indexed or used for calibration.
retrieval_action_prior.public_anchor: FDM-1 IDM denoises masked action tokens from video/action context before labeling video data; a train-video/action retrieval prior approximates unpublished denoising priors without changing the action-token objective.

temporal_button_class_auxiliary.claim_boundary: Open D2E approximation inside the public masked-diffusion action-token recipe; not a post-hoc target heuristic and not closed-source FDM-1 parity.
temporal_button_class_auxiliary.d2e_approximation: Train a no-button-vs-button-token auxiliary classifier from the same temporal masked action-token representation over fit D2E rows, then blend per-token class probabilities into mouse-button candidate scores before train-heldout family calibration. Target labels are never used for scoring.
temporal_button_class_auxiliary.public_anchor: FDM-1 IDM denoises action-token sequences from noncausal video/action context; unpublished scoring details must recover sparse click transition identity, not only event presence.

temporal_event_auxiliary.claim_boundary: Auxiliary heads are open D2E approximations inside the recipe-shaped IDM, not a post-hoc heuristic and not a closed-source FDM-1 parity claim.
temporal_event_auxiliary.d2e_approximation: Train key/button event-presence heads on held-out D2E training labels from the same temporal action-token targets, and use their probabilities only to bias candidate scores during iterative center-token emission.
temporal_event_auxiliary.public_anchor: FDM-1 IDM denoises action tokens from noncausal video/action context; sparse event-presence auxiliaries are an unpublished-detail approximation to improve key/button action-token discovery without replacing token prediction.

temporal_sequence_masked_diffusion.claim_boundary: Open recipe approximation on D2E; no FDM-1 internal-parity claim.
temporal_sequence_masked_diffusion.d2e_approximation: Use raw downsampled D2E frame references and a local temporal action-token sequence around each row.
temporal_sequence_masked_diffusion.public_anchor: FDM-1 IDM predicts masked action-token sequences noncausally from all frames and iteratively unmasks high-confidence positions.

fdm1_recipe_alignment.unlabeled_distribution_budget: FDM-1-style iterative unmasking uses confidence budgets; this split-safe approximation adapts mouse-button unmask threshold to unlabeled target candidate-score distribution while preserving train-heldout emission budget and never using target labels.

video_encoder_pretraining.d2e_approximation: Masked raw-frame reconstruction pretraining over decoded D2E screen-video frame stacks.
video_encoder_pretraining.public_anchor: FDM-1 reports a video encoder trained with masked compression/self-supervised prediction.

family_non_noop_budget.claim_boundary: Family budgets are calibrated on held-out training rows only; target labels remain evaluation/diagnostic only. Unlabeled distribution adaptation uses target candidate scores only, not target labels.

unlabeled_distribution_adaptation.claim_boundary: Uses only unlabeled target candidate scores and train-heldout emission budgets; target ground-truth labels are not inspected.
